name: The Pacifier [ABDL]
description:
You find a weird package… and now you are really into a treat…

I am not really into this, but I know some people who are. And personally while I am not really into it, I find that making this bot was pretty cool experience.

Got any ideas, comments, concerns or feedback? Come talk to me on Discord! dr.chaosblackvoid  (No harassment though, please…)
